objective:

Create file governance/validators/validate_managed_channel_schema.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED_SCHEMA_KEYS = {"message_required_fields", "proof_policy", "allowed_roles"}
REQUIRED_MESSAGE_FIELDS = {"message_id", "created_at_utc3", "source_object", "target_object", "contour", "role", "payload", "proof_policy"}


def validate(path="governance/channels/managed_channel_schema.json"):
    data = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    missing = REQUIRED_SCHEMA_KEYS - set(data)
    if missing:
        errors.append(f"schema missing {sorted(missing)}")
    fields = set(data.get("message_required_fields", []))
    missing_fields = REQUIRED_MESSAGE_FIELDS - fields
    if missing_fields:
        errors.append(f"message fields missing {sorted(missing_fields)}")
    proof = data.get("proof_policy", {})
    for key in ["no_secrets", "templates_not_proof", "mock_not_release_proof"]:
        if proof.get(key) is not True:
            errors.append(f"proof_policy.{key} must be true")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS managed_channel_schema")
